zh.lifeSummary: 當Oliver Bunker於1535年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾廷格利特時，他的父親William Bunker39歲，母親Ann Gosseline34歲。他於1571年與Joan Chandler在英國英格蘭貝德福爾廷格利特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1611年在英國貝德福爾廷格利特被列為yeoman。他去世於1616年8月25日在英國貝德福爾廷格利特享年81歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾廷格利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oliver Bunker于1535年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾廷格利特时，他的父亲William Bunker39岁，母亲Ann Gosseline34岁。他于1571年与Joan Chandler在英国英格兰貝德福爾廷格利特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1611年在英国貝德福爾廷格利特被列为yeoman。他去世于1616年8月25日在英国貝德福爾廷格利特享年81岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾廷格利特。

nameMeanings.name: Bunker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname, of Norman origin, for a reliable or good-hearted person, from Old French bon ‘good’ + cuer ‘heart’ (from Latin cor).
History: Bunker Hill in Charlestown, MA, was named as land assigned in 1634 to George Bunker of Charlestown, who had emigrated from Odell in Bedfordshire, England.

variants.name: Banker
meanings: English: from Middle English banker, banc(o)ur, bankquer, bankert ‘covering of tapestry or other fabric for a bench, couch, or chair; ornamental hanging’, possibly a nickname or occupational name for someone who made or sold such things.
English: occupational name possibly from Middle English benker, seemingly ‘maker of benches’ but recorded only in names.
English: perhaps a variant of   Bunker  .

variants.name: Bunkers
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English   Bunker  .
In some cases possibly also Dutch: perhaps a variant of Benkers, itself a cognate of German Benkert . The surname Bunkers is very rare in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Boenker
meanings: occupational name for a carpenter, a rounded form of   Benker  .

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Oliver Bunker was born in 1535, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bunker, was 39 and his mother, Ann Gosseline, was 34. He married Joan Chandler in 1571, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. In 1611, at the age of 76, his occupation is listed as yeoman in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England. He died on 25 August 1616, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oliver Bunker est né en 1535, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bunker, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ann Gosseline, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Joan Chandler en 1571, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. En 1611, à l’âge de 76 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est yeoman à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 25 août 1616, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Oliver Bunker 1535 in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bunker 39 und seine Mutter Ann Gosseline 34. Er hat 1571 in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Chandler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1611, als er 76 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als yeoman in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. August 1616 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Bunker è nato il nel 1535 nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Bunker, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Ann Gosseline, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Joan Chandler nel 1571, nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1611, all'età di 76 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come yeoman nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England. Morì il 25 agosto 1616, nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Oliver Bunkerが1535年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスで生まれた時，父William Bunkerは39歳，母Ann Gosselineは34歳であった。1571年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスでJoan Chandlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1611年，76歳の時，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスでの職業はyeomanと記録されている。彼は1616年8月25日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスで81歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Oliver Bunker(이)가 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bunker(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Gosseline(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1571년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 Joan Chandler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1611년, 76세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 yeoman이었다. 그는 1616년 8월 25일 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Bunker nasceu em 1535, em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bunker, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ann Gosseline, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Chandler em 1571, em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1611, com 76 anos, sua profissão aparece como yeoman em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1616, em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oliver Bunker родился в 1535 г. в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bunker было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Gosseline, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Chandler в 1571 г. в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1611 году, в возрасте 76 лет,  он работал по профессии yeoman в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия. Он умер 25 августа 1616 г. в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Oliver Bunker nació en 1535, en Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Bunker, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ann Gosseline, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Joan Chandler en 1571, en Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. En 1611, a la edad de 76 años, su ocupación registrada era yeoman en Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1616, en Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
